38 #include <winsock2.h>

40 #define NATS_EXTERN __declspec(dllexport)

43 #else
44 #define NATS_EXTERN
45 #endif
46
47 typedef SOCKET natsSock;
48#else
49 #define NATS_EXTERN
50 typedef int natsSock;
51#endif

86#define NATS_DEFAULT_URL "nats://localhost:4222"
87
97 #define JSMsgSize "Nats-Msg-Size"
98
111 #define JSMsgRollup "Nats-Rollup"
112
120 #define JSMsgRollupSubject "sub"
121
129 #define JSMsgRollupAll "all"
130
131 // Headers for republished messages and direct get.
132 #define JSStream "Nats-Stream"
133 #define JSSequence "Nats-Sequence"
134 #define JSLastSequence "Nats-Last-Sequence"
135 #define JSTimeStamp "Nats-Time-Stamp"
136 #define JSSubject "Nats-Subject"
137
138//
139// Types.
140//
152typedef struct __natsConnection natsConnection;
153
159typedef struct __natsStatistics natsStatistics;
160
165typedef struct __natsSubscription natsSubscription;
166
172typedef struct __natsMsg natsMsg;
173
178typedef struct __natsOptions natsOptions;
179
187typedef char natsInbox;
188
193typedef struct __natsHeader natsHeader;
194
195#ifndef BUILD_IN_DOXYGEN
196// Forward declaration
197typedef void (*natsThreadStartedHandler)(void *closure);
198#endif
199
205typedef struct __natsClientConfig
206{
207 int64_t DefaultWriteDeadline;
208
209 int64_t LockSpinCount;
210
211 // Subscription message delivery thread control
212 bool DefaultToThreadPool;
213 int ThreadPoolMax;
214
215 // Reply message delivery thread control
216 bool DefaultRepliesToThreadPool;
217 bool UseSeparatePoolForReplies;
218 int ReplyThreadPoolMax;
219
220 // Callback invoked when a thread created by the library starts
221 natsThreadStartedHandler ThreadStartedHandler;
222 void *ThreadStartedHandlerClosure;
223
224} natsClientConfig;
225

250{
251 natsMsg **Msgs;
252 int Count;
253
254} natsMsgList;

261{
265 const char **List;
269 int Count;
270
271} natsMetadata;

281typedef struct __jsCtx jsCtx;

298typedef struct jsPubOptions
299{
300 int64_t MaxWait;
301 const char *MsgId;
302 const char *ExpectStream;
303 const char *ExpectLastMsgId;
304 uint64_t ExpectLastSeq;
305 uint64_t ExpectLastSubjectSeq;
306 const char *ExpectLastSubjectSeqSubject;
307 bool ExpectNoMessage;
308 int64_t MsgTTL;
309
310} jsPubOptions;

315typedef enum
316{
317 js_LimitsPolicy = 0,
318 js_InterestPolicy,
319 js_WorkQueuePolicy,
320
321} jsRetentionPolicy;
322
326typedef enum
327{
328 js_DiscardOld = 0,
329 js_DiscardNew,
330
331} jsDiscardPolicy;
332
336typedef enum
337{
338 js_FileStorage = 0,
339 js_MemoryStorage,
340
341} jsStorageType;
342
346typedef enum
347{
348 js_StorageCompressionNone = 0,
349 js_StorageCompressionS2,
350} jsStorageCompression;
351
355typedef enum
356{
357 js_DeliverAll = 0,
358 js_DeliverLast,
359 js_DeliverNew,
360 js_DeliverByStartSequence,
361 js_DeliverByStartTime,
362 js_DeliverLastPerSubject,
363
364} jsDeliverPolicy;
365
369typedef enum
370{
371 js_AckExplicit = 0,
372 js_AckNone,
373 js_AckAll,
374
375
376} jsAckPolicy;
377
381typedef enum
382{
383 js_ReplayInstant = 0,
384 js_ReplayOriginal,
385
386} jsReplayPolicy;
387
391typedef enum
392{
393 js_PersistDefault = 0,
394 js_PersistAsync,
395} jsPersistModeType;

408typedef struct jsPlacement
409{
410 const char *Cluster;
411 const char **Tags;
412 int TagsLen;
413
414} jsPlacement;
415
425typedef struct jsExternalStream
426{
427 const char *APIPrefix;
428 const char *DeliverPrefix;
429
430} jsExternalStream;
431
444typedef struct jsStreamSource
445{
446 const char *Name;
447 uint64_t OptStartSeq;
448 int64_t OptStartTime;
449 const char *FilterSubject;
450 jsExternalStream *External;
451 // Domain and External are mutually exclusive.
452 // If Domain is set, an External value will be created with
453 // the APIPrefix constructed based on the Domain value.
454 const char *Domain;
455
456} jsStreamSource;
457
461typedef struct jsRePublish
462{
463 const char *Source;
464 const char *Destination;
465 bool HeadersOnly;
466
467} jsRePublish;

474{
475 const char *Source;
476 const char *Destination;
477} jsSubjectTransformConfig;

483typedef struct jsStreamConsumerLimits
484{
485 int64_t InactiveThreshold;
486 int MaxAckPending;
487} jsStreamConsumerLimits;
488
568typedef struct jsStreamConfig {
569 const char *Name;
570 const char *Description;
571 const char **Subjects;
572 int SubjectsLen;
573 jsRetentionPolicy Retention;
574 int64_t MaxConsumers;
575 int64_t MaxMsgs;
576 int64_t MaxBytes;
577 int64_t MaxAge;
578 int64_t MaxMsgsPerSubject;
579 int32_t MaxMsgSize;
580 jsDiscardPolicy Discard;
581 jsStorageType Storage;
582 int64_t Replicas;
583 bool NoAck;
584 const char *Template;
585 int64_t Duplicates;
586 jsPlacement *Placement;
587 jsStreamSource *Mirror;
588 jsStreamSource **Sources;
589 int SourcesLen;
590 bool Sealed;
591 bool DenyDelete;
592 bool DenyPurge;
593
596 bool AllowRollup;
597
600 jsRePublish *RePublish;
601
604 bool AllowDirect;
605
608 bool MirrorDirect;
609
612 bool DiscardNewPerSubject;
613
617 natsMetadata Metadata;
618
621 jsStorageCompression Compression;
622
624 uint64_t FirstSeq;
625
628 jsSubjectTransformConfig SubjectTransform;
629
632 jsStreamConsumerLimits ConsumerLimits;
633
636 bool AllowMsgTTL;
637
641 int64_t SubjectDeleteMarkerTTL;
642
645 jsPersistModeType PersistMode;
646
647} jsStreamConfig;
648

714typedef struct jsStreamState
715{
716 uint64_t Msgs;
717 uint64_t Bytes;
718 uint64_t FirstSeq;
719 int64_t FirstTime;
720 uint64_t LastSeq;
721 int64_t LastTime;
722 int64_t NumSubjects;
723 jsStreamStateSubjects *Subjects;
724 uint64_t NumDeleted;
725 uint64_t *Deleted;
726 int DeletedLen;
727 jsLostStreamData *Lost;
728 int64_t Consumers;
729
730} jsStreamState;

750typedef struct jsClusterInfo
751{

760
761} jsClusterInfo;

776} jsStreamSourceInfo;

785 const char *Cluster;
786
787} jsStreamAlternate;

796{

800 jsClusterInfo *Cluster;

802 jsStreamSourceInfo **Sources;

805 int AlternatesLen;
806
807} jsStreamInfo;

831{

880typedef struct jsConsumerConfig
881{
882 const char *Name;
883 const char *Durable;
884 const char *Description;
885 jsDeliverPolicy DeliverPolicy;
886 uint64_t OptStartSeq;
887 int64_t OptStartTime;
888 jsAckPolicy AckPolicy;
889 int64_t AckWait;
890 int64_t MaxDeliver;
891 int64_t *BackOff;
892 int BackOffLen;
893 const char *FilterSubject;
894 jsReplayPolicy ReplayPolicy;
895 uint64_t RateLimit;
896 const char *SampleFrequency;
897 int64_t MaxWaiting;
898 int64_t MaxAckPending;
899 bool FlowControl;
900 int64_t Heartbeat;
901 bool HeadersOnly;
902
903 // Pull based options.
904 int64_t MaxRequestBatch;
905 int64_t MaxRequestExpires;
906 int64_t MaxRequestMaxBytes;
907
908 // Push based options.
909 const char *DeliverSubject;
910 const char *DeliverGroup;
911
912 // Ephemeral inactivity threshold.
913 int64_t InactiveThreshold;
914
915 // Generally inherited by parent stream and other markers, now can be configured directly.
916 int64_t Replicas;
917 // Force memory storage.
918 bool MemoryStorage;
919
920 // Configuration options introduced in 2.10
921
922 const char **FilterSubjects;
923 int FilterSubjectsLen;
924 natsMetadata Metadata;
925
926 // Configuration options introduced in 2.11
927
931 int64_t PauseUntil;
932
936 const char *PriorityPolicy;
937
942 int64_t PinnedTTL;
943
945 const char **PriorityGroups;
946 int PriorityGroupsLen;
947} jsConsumerConfig;
948

967{
968 uint64_t Stream;
969 uint64_t ConsumerClient;
970 uint64_t ConsumerServer;
971
972} jsConsumerSequenceMismatch;

1102 bool Paused;

1104 jsPriorityGroupState *PriorityGroups;
1105 int PriorityGroupsLen;
1106} jsConsumerInfo;

1188typedef struct jsAccountInfo
1189{

1199
1200} jsAccountInfo;

1210{

1218

1224typedef struct jsPubAck
1225{
1226 char *Stream;
1227 uint64_t Sequence;
1228 char *Domain;
1229 bool Duplicate;
1230
1231} jsPubAck;

1237typedef struct jsPubAckErr
1238{
1239 natsMsg *Msg;
1240 natsStatus Err;
1241 jsErrCode ErrCode;
1242 const char *ErrText;
1243
1244} jsPubAckErr;
1245
1246#ifndef BUILD_IN_DOXYGEN
1247// Forward declarations
1248typedef void (*jsPubAckErrHandler)(jsCtx *js, jsPubAckErr *pae, void *closure);
1249typedef void (*jsPubAckHandler)(jsCtx *js, natsMsg *msg, jsPubAck *pa, jsPubAckErr *pae, void *closure);
1250#endif

1261typedef struct jsDirectGetMsgOptions
1262{
1263 uint64_t Sequence;
1264 const char *NextBySubject;
1265 const char *LastBySubject;
1266
1267} jsDirectGetMsgOptions;

1274typedef struct jsFetchRequest
1275{
1276 int64_t Expires;
1277 int Batch;
1278 int64_t MaxBytes;
1279 bool NoWait;
1280 int64_t Heartbeat;
1281
1282 // The use of these fields require nats-server v2.11.0 or later
1283 int64_t MinPending;
1284 int64_t MinAckPending;
1285 const char *ID;
1287 const char *Group;
1288 // The use of this field require nats-server v2.12.0 or later
1289 uint8_t Priority;
1292
1293} jsFetchRequest;
1294
1316typedef void (*jsFetchCompleteHandler)(natsConnection *nc, natsSubscription *sub, natsStatus s, void *closure);
1317
1328typedef bool (*jsFetchNextHandler)(int *messages, int64_t *maxBytes, natsSubscription *sub, void *closure);
1329
1335typedef struct jsOptionsPullSubscribeAsync
1336{
1337 int64_t Timeout;
1338 int MaxMessages;
1339 int64_t MaxBytes;
1340
1348 bool NoWait;
1349
1353 jsFetchCompleteHandler CompleteHandler;
1354 void *CompleteHandlerClosure;
1355
1358 int64_t Heartbeat;
1359
1364 const char *Group;
1365
1371 int64_t MinPending;
1372
1378 int64_t MinAckPending;
1379
1383 int FetchSize;
1384
1391 int KeepAhead;
1392
1398 jsFetchNextHandler NextHandler;
1399 void *NextHandlerClosure;
1400
1401} jsOptionsPullSubscribeAsync;
1402
1408typedef struct jsOptionsPublishAsync
1409{
1410 int64_t MaxPending;
1411
1412 // If jsPubAckHandler is specified, the callback will be invoked
1413 // for every asynchronous published message, either as a positive
1414 // result, or with the error encountered when publishing that
1415 // message. If this callback is specified, ErrHandler (see below)
1416 // will be ignored.
1417 jsPubAckHandler AckHandler;
1418 void *AckHandlerClosure;
1419
1420 // This callback is invoked for messages published asynchronously
1421 // when an error is returned by the server or if the library has
1422 // timed-out waiting for an acknowledgment back from the server
1423 // (if publish uses the jsPubOptions.MaxWait).
1424 jsPubAckErrHandler ErrHandler;
1425 void *ErrHandlerClosure;
1426
1427 int64_t StallWait;
1428
1429} jsOptionsPublishAsync;
1430
1440typedef struct jsOptionsStreamPurge
1441{
1442 const char *Subject;
1443 uint64_t Sequence;
1444 uint64_t Keep;
1445
1446} jsOptionsStreamPurge;
1447
1451typedef struct jsOptionsStreamInfo
1452{
1453 bool DeletedDetails;
1454 const char *SubjectsFilter;
1455
1456} jsOptionsStreamInfo;
1457
1464typedef struct jsOptionsStream
1465{
1466 jsOptionsStreamPurge Purge;
1467 jsOptionsStreamInfo Info;
1468
1469} jsOptionsStream;
1470
1476typedef struct jsOptions
1477{
1478 const char *Prefix;
1479 const char *Domain;
1480 int64_t Wait;
1481 jsOptionsPublishAsync PublishAsync;
1482 jsOptionsPullSubscribeAsync PullSubscribeAsync;
1483 jsOptionsStream Stream;
1484
1485} jsOptions;

1490typedef struct __kvStore kvStore;
1491
1495typedef struct __kvEntry kvEntry;
1496
1500typedef struct __kvStatus kvStatus;
1501
1505typedef struct __kvWatcher kvWatcher;
1506
1510typedef enum
1511{
1512 kvOp_Unknown = 0,
1513 kvOp_Put,
1514 kvOp_Delete,
1515 kvOp_Purge,
1516
1517} kvOperation;
1518
1524typedef struct kvConfig
1525{
1526 const char *Bucket;
1527 const char *Description;
1528 int32_t MaxValueSize;
1529 uint8_t History;
1530 int64_t TTL;
1531 int64_t MaxBytes;
1532 jsStorageType StorageType;
1533 int Replicas;
1534 jsRePublish *RePublish;
1535 jsStreamSource *Mirror;
1536 jsStreamSource **Sources;
1537 int SourcesLen;
1538
1539} kvConfig;
1540
1546typedef struct kvWatchOptions
1547{
1548 bool IgnoreDeletes;
1549 bool IncludeHistory;
1550 bool MetaOnly;
1551 int64_t Timeout;
1552 bool UpdatesOnly;
1553
1554} kvWatchOptions;
1555
1561typedef struct kvPurgeOptions
1562{
1563 // How long to wait (in milliseconds) for some operations to complete.
1564 int64_t Timeout;
1565
1566 // When calling kvStore_PurgeDeletes(), all keys that have a delete or
1567 // purge marker as the last entry are gathered and then those keys
1568 // are purged of their content, including the marker.
1569 // Starting with NATS C client v3.3.0, if this option is not specified,
1570 // only the markers older than 30 minutes will be deleted. Use this
1571 // option to set the limit or a negative value to force removal of
1572 // markers regardless of their age.
1573 // The value is expressed as a time in nanoseconds.
1574 int64_t DeleteMarkersOlderThan;
1575
1576} kvPurgeOptions;
1577
1595typedef struct kvEntryList
1596{
1597 kvEntry **Entries;
1598 int Count;
1599
1600} kvEntryList;
1601
1619typedef struct kvKeysList
1620{
1621 char **Keys;
1622 int Count;
1623
1624} kvKeysList;

2043#if defined(NATS_HAS_STREAMING)
2048typedef struct __stanConnection stanConnection;
2049
2054typedef struct __stanSubscription stanSubscription;
2055
2060typedef struct __stanMsg stanMsg;
2061
2066typedef struct __stanConnOptions stanConnOptions;

2074
// end of typesGroup
2076
2077//
2078// Callbacks.
2079//
2080
2103typedef void (*natsMsgHandler)(
2104 natsConnection *nc, natsSubscription *sub, natsMsg *msg, void *closure);
2105
2119typedef void (*natsConnectionHandler)(
2120 natsConnection *nc, void *closure);
2121
2133typedef natsStatus (*natsProxyConnHandler)(
2134 natsSock *fd, char *host, int port, void *closure);
2135
2142typedef void (*natsErrHandler)(
2143 natsConnection *nc, natsSubscription *subscription, natsStatus err,
2144 void *closure);
2145
2159typedef natsStatus (*natsEvLoop_Attach)(
2160 void **userData,
2161 void *loop,
2162 natsConnection *nc,
2163 natsSock socket);
2164
2174typedef natsStatus (*natsEvLoop_ReadAddRemove)(
2175 void *userData,
2176 bool add);
2177
2187typedef natsStatus (*natsEvLoop_WriteAddRemove)(
2188 void *userData,
2189 bool add);
2190
2198typedef natsStatus (*natsEvLoop_Detach)(
2199 void *userData);
2200
2222typedef natsStatus (*natsUserJWTHandler)(
2223 char **userJWT,
2224 char **customErrTxt,
2225 void *closure);
2226
2227
2253typedef natsStatus (*natsSignatureHandler)(
2254 char **customErrTxt,
2255 unsigned char **signature,
2256 int *signatureLength,
2257 const char *nonce,
2258 void *closure);
2259
2268typedef const char* (*natsTokenHandler)(void *closure);
2269
2270
2278typedef void (*natsOnCompleteCB)(void *closure);
2279
2300typedef int64_t (*natsCustomReconnectDelayHandler)(natsConnection *nc, int attempts, void *closure);
2301
2325typedef int (*natsSSLVerifyCb)(int preverifyOk, void *ctx);
2326
2327#ifdef BUILD_IN_DOXYGEN
2361typedef void (*jsPubAckErrHandler)(jsCtx *js, jsPubAckErr *pae, void *closure);
2362
2404typedef void (*jsPubAckHandler)(jsCtx *js, natsMsg *msg, jsPubAck *pa, jsPubAckErr *pae, void *closure);
2405
2446typedef void (*natsThreadStartedHandler)(void *closure);
2447#endif
2448
2449#if defined(NATS_HAS_STREAMING)
2458typedef void (*stanPubAckHandler)(const char *guid, const char *error, void *closure);
2459
2469typedef void (*stanMsgHandler)(
2470 stanConnection *sc, stanSubscription *sub, const char *channel, stanMsg *msg, void *closure);
2471
2478typedef void (*stanConnectionLostHandler)(
2479 stanConnection *sc, const char* errorTxt, void *closure);
2480#endif
2481
// end of callbacksGroup
2483

2486//

2933/*
2934 * The above is for doxygen. The proper syntax for username/password
2935 * is without the '\' character:
2936 *
2937 * nats://localhost:4222
2938 * nats://user@localhost:4222
2939 * nats://user:password@localhost:4222
2940 */

9459//
9460// Microservices.
9461//
9462
9505typedef struct micro_client_s microClient;
9506
9510typedef struct __for_forward_compatibility_only microClientConfig;
9511
9521typedef struct micro_endpoint_s microEndpoint;
9522
9530typedef struct micro_endpoint_config_s microEndpointConfig;
9531
9541typedef struct micro_endpoint_info_s microEndpointInfo;
9542
9551typedef struct micro_endpoint_stats_s microEndpointStats;
9552
9565typedef struct micro_error_s microError;
9566
9574typedef struct micro_group_s microGroup;
9575
9582typedef struct micro_group_config_s microGroupConfig;
9583
9589typedef struct micro_request_s microRequest;
9590
9602typedef struct micro_service_s microService;
9603
9613typedef struct micro_service_config_s microServiceConfig;
9614
9624typedef struct micro_service_info_s microServiceInfo;
9625
9632typedef struct micro_service_stats_s microServiceStats;
9633
9634
9635extern NATS_EXTERN microError *micro_ErrorOutOfMemory;
9636extern NATS_EXTERN microError *micro_ErrorInvalidArg;
9637
// end of microTypes
9639
9658typedef microError *(*microRequestHandler)(microRequest *req);
9659
9682typedef void (*microErrorHandler)(microService *m, microEndpoint *ep, natsStatus s);
9683
9695typedef void (*microDoneHandler)(microService *m);
9696
// end of microCallbacks
9698
9709struct micro_endpoint_config_s
9710{
9716 const char *Name;
9717
9727 const char *Subject;
9728
9733 const char *QueueGroup;
9734
9739 bool NoQueueGroup;
9740
9745 natsMetadata Metadata;
9746
9750 microRequestHandler Handler;
9751
9756 void *State;
9757};
9758
9762struct micro_endpoint_info_s
9763{
9767 const char *Name;
9768
9772 const char *Subject;
9773
9778 const char *QueueGroup;
9779
9784 natsMetadata Metadata;
9785};
9786
9790struct micro_endpoint_stats_s
9791{
9792 const char *Name;
9793 const char *Subject;
9794
9799 const char *QueueGroup;
9800
9804 int64_t NumRequests;
9805
9810 int64_t NumErrors;
9811
9815 int64_t ProcessingTimeSeconds;
9816
9820 int64_t ProcessingTimeNanoseconds;
9821
9825 int64_t AverageProcessingTimeNanoseconds;
9826
9830 char LastErrorString[2048];
9831};
9832
9836struct micro_group_config_s
9837{
9839 const char *Prefix;
9840
9842 const char *QueueGroup;
9843
9845 bool NoQueueGroup;
9846};
9847
9854struct micro_service_config_s
9855{
9861 const char *Name;
9862
9866 const char *Version;
9867
9871 const char *Description;
9872
9877 const char *QueueGroup;
9878
9883 bool NoQueueGroup;
9884
9889 natsMetadata Metadata;
9890
9898 microEndpointConfig *Endpoint;
9899
9907 microRequestHandler StatsHandler;
9908
9916 microErrorHandler ErrHandler;
9917
9926 microDoneHandler DoneHandler;
9927
9935 void *State;
9936};
9937
9943struct micro_service_info_s
9944{
9948 const char *Type;
9949
9953 const char *Name;
9954
9958 const char *Version;
9959
9963 const char *Description;
9964
9968 const char *Id;
9969
9973 natsMetadata Metadata;
9974
9978 microEndpointInfo *Endpoints;
9979
9983 int EndpointsLen;
9984};
9985
9989struct micro_service_stats_s
9990{
9994 const char *Type;
9995
9999 const char *Name;
10000
10004 const char *Version;
10005
10009 const char *Id;
10010
10014 int64_t Started;
10015
10019 microEndpointStats *Endpoints;
10020
10024 int EndpointsLen;
10025};
10026
// end of microStructs
10028

Returns the name of this connection.

Flushes the connection with a given timeout.

Process a detach event when using external event loop.

Process a socket close event when using external event loop.

Returns the connection local IP and port.

Returns the round trip time between this client and the server.

Drains the connection with given timeout.

NATS_EXTERN natsStatus stanConnection_Connect(stanConnection **sc, const char *clusterID, const char *clientID, stanConnOptions *options)
Connects to a NATS Streaming Server using the provided options.
stanConnection_Close
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus stanConnection_Close(stanConnection *sc)
Closes the connection.
stanConnection_Destroy
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus stanConnection_Destroy(stanConnection *sc)
Destroys the connection object.
stanConnOptions_SetDiscoveryPrefix
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus stanConnOptions_SetDiscoveryPrefix(stanConnOptions *opts, const char *prefix)
Sets the subject prefix the library sends the connect request to.
stanConnOptions_SetConnectionLostHandler
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus stanConnOptions_SetConnectionLostHandler(stanConnOptions *opts, stanConnectionLostHandler handler, void *closure)
Sets the connection lost handler.
stanConnOptions_SetMaxPubAcksInflight
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus stanConnOptions_SetMaxPubAcksInflight(stanConnOptions *opts, int maxPubAcksInflight, float percentage)
Sets the maximum number of published messages without outstanding ACKs from the server.
stanConnOptions_SetPubAckWait
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus stanConnOptions_SetPubAckWait(stanConnOptions *opts, int64_t wait)
Sets the timeout for waiting for an ACK for a published message.
stanConnOptions_SetURL
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus stanConnOptions_SetURL(stanConnOptions *opts, const char *url)
Sets the URL to connect to.
stanConnOptions_SetConnectionWait
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus stanConnOptions_SetConnectionWait(stanConnOptions *opts, int64_t wait)
Sets the timeout for establishing a connection.
stanConnOptions_Destroy
NATS_EXTERN void stanConnOptions_Destroy(stanConnOptions *opts)
Destroys a stanConnOptions object.
stanConnOptions_SetPings
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus stanConnOptions_SetPings(stanConnOptions *opts, int interval, int maxOut)
Sets the ping interval and max out values.
stanConnOptions_SetNATSOptions
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus stanConnOptions_SetNATSOptions(stanConnOptions *opts, natsOptions *nOpts)
Sets the NATS Options to use to create the connection.
stanConnOptions_Create
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus stanConnOptions_Create(stanConnOptions **newOpts)
Creates a stanConnOptions object.
stanConnection_PublishAsync
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus stanConnection_PublishAsync(stanConnection *sc, const char *channel, const void *data, int dataLen, stanPubAckHandler ah, void *ahClosure)
Asynchronously publishes data on a channel.
stanConnection_Publish
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus stanConnection_Publish(stanConnection *sc, const char *channel, const void *data, int dataLen)
Publishes data on a channel.
stanConnection_QueueSubscribe
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus stanConnection_QueueSubscribe(stanSubscription **sub, stanConnection *sc, const char *channel, const char *queueGroup, stanMsgHandler cb, void *cbClosure, stanSubOptions *options)
Creates a queue subscription.
stanConnection_Subscribe
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus stanConnection_Subscribe(stanSubscription **sub, stanConnection *sc, const char *channel, stanMsgHandler cb, void *cbClosure, stanSubOptions *options)
Creates a subscription.

Returns the message payload.

stanMsg_GetSequence

Closes the subscription.

stanSubOptions_Destroy

Destroys a stanSubOptions object.
stanSubOptions_StartAtTimeDelta
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus stanSubOptions_StartAtTimeDelta(stanSubOptions *opts, int64_t delta)
Sets the desired start position based on the given delta.
stanSubOptions_SetMaxInflight
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus stanSubOptions_SetMaxInflight(stanSubOptions *opts, int maxInflight)
Sets the the maximum number of messages the cluster will send without an ACK.
stanSubOptions_StartAtSequence
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus stanSubOptions_StartAtSequence(stanSubOptions *opts, uint64_t seq)
Sets the desired start position based on the given sequence number.
stanSubOptions_SetManualAckMode

Sets the subscription's acknowledgment mode.

The subscription should start with the last message in the channel.

Sets the Durable Name for this subscription.
stanSubOptions_StartAtTime
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus stanSubOptions_StartAtTime(stanSubOptions *opts, int64_t time)
Sets the desired start position based on the given time.
stanSubOptions_DeliverAllAvailable
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus stanSubOptions_DeliverAllAvailable(stanSubOptions *opts)
The subscription should start with the first message in the channel.
stanSubOptions_Create
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus stanSubOptions_Create(stanSubOptions **newOpts)
Creates a stanSubOptions object.
stanSubOptions_SetAckWait
NATS_EXTERN natsStatus stanSubOptions_SetAckWait(stanSubOptions *opts, int64_t wait)
Sets the timeout for waiting for an ACK from the cluster's point of view for delivered messages.

Creates a natsStatistics object.

Returns the number of dropped messages.
